guardrails: RECOMMEND-ONLY sizing gauge (never trades). Liquidity is the water level: as L falls, total exposure shrinks and the smallest fish (tier3) is cut first. See philosophy/concepts/liquidity-fishbowl.md + 08-risk-and-position.
note: L composite per philosophy/concepts/liquidity-fishbowl.md. SPX 60d rvol + NYSE A/D are optional injected terms; when absent the present weights are renormalised. For backtests pass vintage_date (ALFRED) so L uses values as first published, not later revisions.
